code: import React from'react';import'./ThankYou.css';import{useTranslation}from'react-i18next';import{CheckCircle}from'lucide-react';import tanuhLogo from'../assets/tanuh.png';import iiscLogo from'../assets/IISc_logo.png';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function ThankYou(_ref){let{onReset}=_ref;const{t}=useTranslation('thankyou');return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"thank-you-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"thank-you-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"thank-you-logos",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:tanuhLogo,alt:"TANUH Logo",className:"logo"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:iiscLogo,alt:"IISc Logo",className:"logo"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"success-icon",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CheckCircle,{size:80,color:"#8B008B"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:t('title')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"message",children:t('message')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"info-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:t('nextSteps.title')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:t('nextSteps.items',{returnObjects:true}).map((item,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:item},index))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"reset-button",onClick:onReset,children:t('buttons.reset')||'Start New Screening'})]})});}export default ThankYou;
